message:
[bd-kae4] ft-nn: pad modules compose via index_select for autograd

ReflectionPad1d/2d, ReplicationPad1d/2d/3d, and CircularPad1d/2d each
called tensor_values + tensor_variable(_, _, false) to assemble the
padded output, severing autograd. Models using these paddings (CNNs,
U-Nets, GANs, audio stacks) silently lost input gradients.

Replaced each forward() with sequential tensor_index_select along
each spatial axis. index_select is autograd-aware; backward sums the
upstream gradient at every output position back into the source
input position, exactly matching PyTorch semantics. Added 7 input-
gradient regression tests covering all 7 modules.

Workspace tests: ft-nn 524 (was 517) + 6 other crates green.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
